creator: john@ozsrv01.riverwillow.net.au
text:
Relocation of the Ports tree is supported. The non-default location
	is defined in PORTSDIR= in /etc/make.conf. pkg_version only looks in 
	the default location unless the PORTSDIR environment variable
	is set, or unless the full path to the index file is specified on
	the command line.

How-To-Repeat: 	- Move (or rename) the ports tree
	- Edit /etc/make.conf to point PORTSDIR to new name/location.
	- Execute pkg_version (no output)
	- Execute pkg_version /new/path (works fine)
